meta.sigmas_unavailable_note: sigma {0.5,0.3} NOT in cached pool; parallel GPU re-collection.
meta.evpd_typematch_status: DEFERRED/PLANNED - no measured vocal-presence/type-match labels; ADSR run is ADSR-noEVPD.

meta.offline_reselection_caveat: Fixed 8-pool: a 'restart' cannot draw a new seed, so restart methods partially reduce to re-selection among cached 8. Online pilot with true new seeds is the real test.
meta.lyric_rule: lyric_intelligibility headline = vocal_scorable subset ONLY (vocal AND en). Instrumental (sentinel 1.0) and non-EN excluded.
